query:
SELECT csi.item_key, csi.amount, csi.funding_source, csi.assigned_phase, csi.payment_method, csi.lump_sum_month
FROM cf_settings_items csi
JOIN cf_settings cs ON csi.settings_id = cs.id
WHERE cs.project_id = 4 AND cs.scenario = 'offplan_escrow'
ORDER BY csi.item_key;
